name: 모닐이네하우스 글루텐프리 공방카페
note: Hongdae/Yeonnam celiac-friendly bakery & cafe. The staff confirmed gluten-free when asked. Highlights: pizza, churros with chocolate dip, salt bread, coffee, and gluten-free cakes. Price is a bit higher than non-GF, but worth it; would revisit. (User review, 2026-02-10; still verify on visit.)

name: 237 피자
note: A gluten-free pizza spot founded by an owner with celiac experience (user-reported). Made to order; when it is busy, expect a wait. Recommended: four-mushroom pizza. Cool interior with nostalgic pop music; located on B1. (User review, 2026-02-10; still verify on visit.)
